learning_phases.name: First Spark
learning_phases.description: First AI exploration — searching for offline LLM on Mac
searches: what is the easiest way to run an offline llm on mac
learning_phases.signal: Curiosity about local AI, not yet coding with it

learning_phases.name: GPT Discovery
learning_phases.description: Intensive ChatGPT exploration — GPT-5, custom GPTs, comparisons
learning_phases.signal: Evaluating AI capabilities, looking for practical workflows

learning_phases.name: Tool Stack Formation
learning_phases.description: MCP servers, Cursor, local voice assistants — building the mental model
searches: cursor and other mac terminal tools
make your own llm local voice assistant
learning_phases.signal: Moving from consumer AI to developer tools. MCP discovery is pivotal.

learning_phases.name: Agent Awakening
learning_phases.description: Claude Agent SDK, vibe coding, tech stack selection — agents become real
searches: how to use claude agent sdk
best programming languages for vibe coding
learning_phases.signal: First search for Claude Code alternatives. Vibe coding as concept enters vocabulary.

learning_phases.name: Quiet Consolidation
learning_phases.description: CLI coding agents, GPT 5.2 — fewer searches, deeper engagement
learning_phases.signal: Less searching, more doing. Learning through building.

learning_phases.name: Claude Code Adoption
learning_phases.description: Claude Code, skills, sidecar tools, Mac Studio for local LLM — full commitment
learning_phases.signal: Coincides with Liminal Era 1 (Seed). These searches are the exact week the project begins.

learning_phases.name: Advanced Agentic
learning_phases.description: Sniper agents, Hermes agent — exploring frontier agentic patterns
learning_phases.signal: Parallel to Liminal Eras 4-9. Searches now about advanced patterns, not basics.
